entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: Pennisetum glaucum (L.) R. Br., the target crop for biofortification

entities.name: IRON CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of iron (Fe) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: ZINC CONCENTRATION
entities.description: The concentration of zinc (Zn) in the grains of pearl millet

entities.name: INBREEDING
entities.description: The effect of mating closely related individuals on trait expression

entities.name: SELFING
entities.description: The process of self-pollination used to derive S1 to S4 population bulks

entities.name: IRRIGATED
entities.description: A growth condition where water is provided to the crop

entities.name: TERMINAL DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: A condition of water scarcity occurring at the end of the crop growth cycle

entities.name: SINGLE-PLANT SELECTION
entities.description: A selection method based on the characteristics of an individual plant

entities.name: PROGENY-BASED SELECTION
entities.description: A selection method based on the performance of the offspring

entities.name: BIOFORTIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the nutritional value of the crop

entities.name: ADDITIVE GENE EFFECTS
entities.description: The cumulative effect of alleles on the expression of micronutrient concentrations

entities.name: PARTIAL DOMINANCE
entities.description: The genetic interaction where one allele partially masks another in determining micronutrient concentrations

relationships.description: Inbreeding effects were studied in pearl millet
Inbreeding affects the expression of iron concentration
Inbreeding affects the expression of zinc concentration
Iron concentrations were higher under terminal drought stress
Zinc concentrations were higher under terminal drought stress
Iron concentrations were evaluated under irrigated conditions
Zinc concentrations were evaluated under irrigated conditions
Genetic changes in iron concentration are positively correlated with zinc concentration
Used to enhance iron concentration in early generations
Used to enhance zinc concentration in early generations
Used to enhance iron concentration in early generations
Used to enhance zinc concentration in early generations
Biofortification initiative focused on pearl millet
Additive gene effects determine iron concentrations
Additive gene effects determine zinc concentrations
Partial dominance of genes determines iron concentrations
Partial dominance of genes determines zinc concentrations
Selfing is the method used to induce inbreeding
